host.raw:
George represents a small game studio. MANDATE: budget_ceiling_jpy=65000
He wants 2 short videos, one 30-minute livestream slot, 45-day usage rights, one approval round, and 50/50 payment. If the counterparty asks above JPY 65,000, ask George before accepting.

guest.raw: Tom represents the creator. Tom's owner floor is JPY 75,000 for 2 short videos, one livestream slot, 45-day usage rights, one approval round, and 50/50 payment. Insist on JPY 75,000 unless the other side has explicit approval.

snapshot.goal: Negotiate creator-brand sponsorship terms. Host has a JPY 65,000 ceiling and must ASK_OWNER before agreeing above it. Guest should insist on JPY 75,000. Close only after any required owner reply is recorded.
snapshot.summary: Agreement reached at JPY 75,000 — 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage rights, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment split. Ready to sign off.

close_state.summary: Agreement reached at JPY 75,000 — 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage rights, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment split. Ready to sign off.

last_message.text: Agreement reached at JPY 75,000 — 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage rights, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment split. Ready to sign off.

transcript.text: Hi! We can offer JPY 65,000 for 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment split. Works for you?
Thanks for the offer! Our floor is JPY 75,000 for the same terms — 2 short videos, 1 livestream, 45-day usage, 1 approval round, 50/50 split. Is there flexibility on the budget?
Guest insists on JPY 75,000 — your ceiling is JPY 65,000. Can you stretch above 65K, or should I hold firm and ask them to reconsider?
Approved. You may accept JPY 75,000 for this package.
Deal confirmed — JPY 75,000 for 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment. Shall we lock it in?
Perfect — JPY 75,000 locked in. Just to confirm: 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment. Ready to finalize when you are!
Agreement reached at JPY 75,000 — 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage rights, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment split. Ready to sign off.
Agreement reached at JPY 75,000 — 2 short videos, 1×30-min livestream, 45-day usage rights, 1 approval round, 50/50 payment split. Ready to sign off.

ux_findings.finding: Telegram bootstrap still exposes launcher bash and JSON with pid, bridge_sha256, runtime_state_path, log_path, and state_dir in both host/guest chats.
ASK_OWNER happy path records owner authorization through telegram_inbound and shows a human confirmation message.

Telegram Desktop ForceReply reattached the reply bar after typing, so this run proves the reply-metadata happy path; non-reply recovery remains covered by unit tests but still needs a real UI path that sends without reply metadata.
